decisions.label: Check if clinician post onboarding survey is needed

rules.name: Yes
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 3 AND 4) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4)
rules.label: Yes

Flow.description: Last Updated for this User story - PR1050558-5648

formulas.name: ProviderSystemStatus
formulas.expression: IF( OR( TEXT({!$Record.Status__c}) <> TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Status__c}), {!$Record.TerminationDate} <> {!$Record__Prior.TerminationDate} ), IF( TEXT({!$Record.Status__c}) = "Candidate", "Candidate", IF( OR( TEXT({!$Record.Status__c}) = "Active", TEXT({!$Record.Status__c}) = "Waiting to be Scheduled", TEXT({!$Record.Status__c}) = "WTBS Here-WRKG at Sister Site", AND( TEXT({!$Record.Status__c}) = "Inactive", {!$Record.TerminationDate} > (TODAY() - 60) ) ), "Active", "" ) ), "" )

Flow.label: HPF Updates Triggered Flow

recordUpdates.label: Update HPF Insurance Provided By Field

recordUpdates.label: Update HPF Insurance Provided By Field for Other Filter Type

subflows.name: Welcome_Email_and_User_Creation_for_Leased_Locums_Managed_Flow_1
subflows.label: Welcome Email and User Creation for Leased, Locums, Managed Flow 1

textTemplates.name: tt_AthenaEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
This new clinician needs to be added to AthenaIDX. Please review the information below and complete the necessary steps to add this clinician.

Clinician Details
 
Clinician Name: {!$Record.Practitioner.FirstName} {!$Record.Practitioner.LastName}
First Scheduled Date: {!$Record.First_Scheduled_Date__c}
Credentialing Status: {!$Record.Credentialling_Status__c}
Professional Title: {!$Record.Practitioner.Professional_Title__c}
Global Provider ID: {!fr_PractitionerGlobalProviderID}
Clinician NPI#: {!$Record.Practitioner.NPI__c}
Military Status: {!$Record.Practitioner.Military_Status__c}
Critical Care Billing Eligible: {!$Record.Critical_Care_Billing_Eligible__c}

Hospital Details
 
Hospital Name: {!$Record.Account.Name}
Global Facility ID: {!fr_ServiceAccountGlobalFacilityID}
Billing Company: {!$Record.Account.Billing_Company__c}
Healthcare Practitioner Facility: {!$Record.HPF_Number__c}

textTemplates.name: tt_HREmaiBody
textTemplates.text: There has been a change in First Clinical Shift for {!$Record.Practitioner.FirstName} {!$Record.Practitioner.LastName}. Please review their Healthcare Practitioner Facility record in Salesforce at the following link: {!fr_RecordLink}
